chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 668 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5627/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.5628/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case. 21.11.2024 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Heard learned Counsel for the applicant and perused the impugned order dated 19.09.2024 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/ Model Criminal Trial Court, Sukkur, whereby the private respondents were granted pre-arrest bail. Perusal of impugned order reflects that bail was granted to the private respondents on the ground that there is delay of five days in lodgment of FIR for which no plausible explanation has been furnished by the complainant; that the offence for which the private respondents have been charged does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. In such situation, no illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/CModel Criminal Trial Court, Sukkur, while granting pre-arrest bail to the private respondents. Resultantly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
